title: Notable Event Aggregation Policy
description: `notable_event_aggregation_policy` contains the data for a notable event aggregation policy which aggregates notable events into episodes.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.label: disabled
attributes.description: `1` if the aggregation policy is disabled and `0` if enabled.

attributes.name: breaking_criteria
attributes.label: breaking_criteria
attributes.description: A JSON blob of all the criteria used to break an episode.

attributes.name: filter_criteria
attributes.label: filter_criteria
attributes.description: A JSON blob of all the criteria used to filter events into an episode.

attributes.name: is_default
attributes.label: is_default
attributes.description: Indicates if this is the default aggregation policy. `1` if it's the default policy and `0` if not.

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: The description of the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: group_severity
attributes.label: group_severity
attributes.description: The default severity of each episode created by the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: group_status
attributes.label: group_status
attributes.description: The default status of each episode created by the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: group_asignee
attributes.label: group_asignee
attributes.description: The default owner of each episode created by the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: group_description
attributes.label: group_description
attributes.description: The default description of each episode created by the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: The title of the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: rules
attributes.label: rules
attributes.description: An array of all the rules and actions to be executed for the notable event aggregation policy.

attributes.name: split_by_field
attributes.label: split_by_field
attributes.description: A string containing all the fields to split episodes by.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
